author: doll-agent
content: 1-arg form: where_condition already matches nonzero behavior — emits per-dim u64 index arrays. No change needed there. 3-arg form: existing where_ requires identical shapes for condition/x/y. Add where_broadcast(condition, x, y) that takes Array<_, IxDyn> for all three and uses broadcast_shapes / broadcast_to to compute the target shape and stride-tricked views, then runs the same ternary select. 3 new tests cover scalar fallback, 2D outer-product broadcast, and shape-mismatch error.
